                        STM32CubeProgrammer v2.22.0                  
      -------------------------------------------------------------------

ST-LINK SN  : 066DFF495056805087254447
ST-LINK FW  : V2J47M34
Board       : --
Voltage     : 3.26V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x439
Revision ID : Rev Z
Device name : STM32F301x4-x6-x8/STM32F302x4-x6-x8/F318xx
NVM size  : 64 KBytes
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M4
BL Version  : 0x40
